title: Connect your fleet
description: Save with pre-negotiated data plans for your fleets
name: data plans
imgAlt: A collage showing a speculative dashboard of fleet connectivity data, and a bus driver operates a vehicle transmitting real-time data.

title: Get scheduling software
description: Plan and schedule your routes with ease with our software options
name: route scheduling
imgAlt: A collage showing route planning software and two transit agency employees adjusting a bus route on a computer.

title: Roll out tap to pay
description: Get tap to pay, cut boarding times, and keep riders moving fast
name: tap to pay
imgAlt: A speculative graph showing share of different payment methods, where most transactions are mobile wallets, followed by bank cards and cash.

title: Broadcast real-time data
description: Get real-time performance insights and share arrival times with riders
name: GTFS Realtime
imgAlt: A collage showing a GTFS code snippet alongside a phone screen that shows a bus approaching in real time.

title: Tap for rider benefits
description: Offer tap to pay reduced fares for older adults, veterans, CalFresh recipients, and more
name: rider benefits
imgAlt: A collage of a web page enrolling a rider in a reduced fare, and an older man with a walker using contactless payments to board a bus and get a reduced fare.
